operation.name: Insert
operation.sql: INSERT INTO chat_create_operations (operation_id, replay_key, actor_user_id, client_msg_id, title, invitee_ids, ttl_period, chat_id, participants_version, status, date, updated_at_sec, expires_at) VALUES (:operation_id, :replay_key, :actor_user_id, :client_msg_id, :title, :invitee_ids, :ttl_period, :chat_id, :participants_version, :status, :date, :updated_at_sec, :expires_at)

operation.name: SelectByReplayKey
operation.sql: SELECT id, operation_id, replay_key, actor_user_id, client_msg_id, title, invitee_ids, ttl_period, chat_id, participants_version, status, date, updated_at_sec, expires_at FROM chat_create_operations WHERE replay_key=:replay_key

operation.name: SelectByReplayKeyForUpdate
operation.sql: SELECT id, operation_id, replay_key, actor_user_id, client_msg_id, title, invitee_ids, ttl_period, chat_id, participants_version, status, date, updated_at_sec, expires_at FROM chat_create_operations WHERE replay_key=:replay_key FOR UPDATE

operation.name: SelectLastCompletedByActor
operation.sql: SELECT id, operation_id, replay_key, actor_user_id, client_msg_id, title, invitee_ids, ttl_period, chat_id, participants_version, status, date, updated_at_sec, expires_at FROM chat_create_operations WHERE actor_user_id=:actor_user_id AND status=:status ORDER BY updated_at_sec DESC LIMIT 1

operation.name: EnsureActorLock
operation.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO chat_create_operations (operation_id, replay_key, actor_user_id, client_msg_id, title, invitee_ids, ttl_period, chat_id, participants_version, status, date, updated_at_sec, expires_at) VALUES (:operation_id, :replay_key, :actor_user_id, 0, '', '', 0, 0, 0, :status, :date, :updated_at_sec, :expires_at)

operation.name: SelectActorLockForUpdate
operation.sql: SELECT id, operation_id, replay_key, actor_user_id, client_msg_id, title, invitee_ids, ttl_period, chat_id, participants_version, status, date, updated_at_sec, expires_at FROM chat_create_operations WHERE operation_id=:operation_id FOR UPDATE

operation.name: MarkChatCreated
operation.sql: UPDATE chat_create_operations SET chat_id=:chat_id, participants_version=:participants_version, status=:status, updated_at_sec=:updated_at_sec WHERE operation_id=:operation_id

operation.name: ResetForRetry
operation.sql: UPDATE chat_create_operations SET operation_id=:operation_id, actor_user_id=:actor_user_id, client_msg_id=:client_msg_id, title=:title, invitee_ids=:invitee_ids, ttl_period=:ttl_period, chat_id=0, participants_version=:participants_version, status=:status, date=:date, updated_at_sec=:updated_at_sec, expires_at=:expires_at WHERE replay_key=:replay_key
